base.$description: Ground plane — decorative fills and background media that must sit behind their own container's content.

raised.$description: Lifted above sibling background media within the same component — e.g. card text over a card illustration.

sticky.$description: Pinned affordance inside a scrolling container — scroll hints, in-card overlays. Above component content, below any page-level overlay.

overlay.$description: Full-surface overlay that covers page content — the mobile navigation panel, drawers, scrims.

modal.$description: Sits above an overlay — dialog chrome and the controls that must stay reachable while an overlay is open (e.g. the close button and logo over the mobile menu).
